productDisplayName: Reebok Men Premier Zigfly Sports Shoes
description: CompositionThese Premier ZigFly shoes combine reebok's top performance running line with the patented Zig technology. These lightweight shoes provide a responsive ride for your run. Stylish and comfortable, wear this with performance clothes when going out for a jog, or team it with jeans and tees.UpperSmoothFit smooth seam upper offers ultimate in comfort with minimal irritationOpen mesh uppers with synthetic overlays for greater breathabilityMesh tongue for greater breathabilityPadded collar for greater comfortCentral lacing for snug FitBrand name appliquéd on the tongueSynthetic overlay on the heel cup with brandingMidsoleLining provides moisture managementForefoot flex grooves for flexibility and better running performancePhylon midsole for lightweight comfortOutsoleLow-profile ZigNano sole for a responsive rideHigh-abrasion rubber outsole for increased durabilityMulti-surface outsole for optimal tractionCarbon rubber heel strikeshoe careDo not machine washRemove dust and dirt with damp clean clothDo not store in direct sunlight
